message:
fix(clippy): additional linter-applied clippy fixes in test files

- Replace manual counter with enumerate() (proptest_content_dedup_telemetry.rs)
- Add `let _ =` for unused must-use return values (proptest_pattern_telemetry.rs)
- Replace `a * b + c` with `b.mul_add(a, c)` (proptest_replay_performance.rs,
  proptest_semantic_anomaly_telemetry.rs)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
